diagrams.title: IPC Mechanism Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the two main categories of IPC: Direct (shared memory) and Indirect (message passing) with sub-types
diagrams.purpose: Understand the taxonomy of IPC mechanisms and their classification

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer with Bounded Buffer
diagrams.description: Illustrates producer and consumer processes sharing a circular buffer with N slots, showing synchronization points
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the synchronization mechanism and data flow in producer-consumer problem

diagrams.title: Critical Section Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a process with entry section, critical section, and exit section
diagrams.purpose: Understand the structure required for proper synchronization
